name: stellacode
description: Code Observatory — observe your codebase as a living constellation

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server -- --target ${STELLA_TARGET:-.}" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
